properties.remark: THIS IS A DELAYED REPORT. STATE TROOPER WAS LOCATED AT HIGHWAY 266 WEST OF CHERAW AND WITNESSED A TORNADO, POSSIBLY TWO. FROM THEIR VANTAGE POINT, THE TROOPER SAID IT WAS LIKELY NORTH CHERAW NEAR CROWLEY COUNTY. TROOPER SAID HE LOGGED THE EVENT AT 8:35 PM. LOCATION AND TIME OF REPORT ARE ESTIMATED BY RADAR.

DELAYED REPORT: STORM CHASER ON CO-10 SOUTHWEST OF LA JUNTA CAPTURED A BRIEF TORNADO OVER OPEN FIELDS ON SUNDAY EVENING. VIDEO SHOWS A QUICKLY DESCENDING FUNNEL REACHING THE GROUND AND THEN QUICKLY BECOMING ENVELOPED BY SHEETS OF RAIN. THE TORNADO LASTED NO LONGER THAN 2-MINUTES, PER CHASERS VIDEO, OR AT LEAST BEFORE THE SHEETS OF RAIN OBSCURED THE VIEW.

DELAYED REPORT: LOCAL BROADCASTER SHARED PICTURES OF THUNDERSTORM WIND DAMAGE IN ELLICOTT, CO FROM YESTERDAYS SEVERE STORMS. BASED ON ARCHIVED RADAR INFORMATION IT APPEARS THAT A MICROBURST DESCENDED RIGHT ON TOP OF THE DAMAGE LOCATION LEADING TO THE OUTBUILDING AND METAL FENCING DAMAGE.
